CustomField.formula: IF( TEXT(will_MARC_Presentation_Material_Picklist__c) != null, TEXT(will_MARC_Presentation_Material_Picklist__c), IF(will_MARC_Presentation_Materials__c = true, "Yes", IF(will_MARC_Presentation_Materials__c= false, "No","")))
CustomField.label: will MARC/VMAP Presentation Materials
